Notice And Motion For Dismissal Of Action For Failure To Provide Statutory Notice To Arbitrate,
Off Calendar Apr-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT LANCE LING LO'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE STATUTORY NOTICE TO ARBITRATE.

APPEARANCES: David H. S. Commins, Esq. of Commins & Knudsen, P.C. 391-6490 for pltf & opposing party; William D. Kopper, Esq. 530/758-0757 for deft & moving party (appearing via Courtcall).

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO MAINTAIN HIS EVIDENTIARY BURDEN. In addition, the Court stated that defendant has 20 days to answer. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Continued To Apr-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
